problem id: 9eac443f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6)

examples:
  00000101 -> 01000000
  00010111 -> 11000000
  01011110 -> 10000000
  01110011 -> 11000000
  00010101 -> 01000000
  11100101 -> 01000000
  01100110 -> 10000000
  00110100 -> 00000000
  10000010 -> 10000000

query: 11011010
predicted answer: 10000000
